data.title: Luminos Fund releases book proving most marginalized children can catch up fast, as 9 in 10 kids in low-income countries can't read by age 10.
data.description: Data shows that 90% of children in low-income nations struggle with reading by age 10. Luminos Fund recently revealed that their program has effectively assisted marginalized children in catching up quickly. Established evidence spanning a decade underscores the success in enhancing literacy rates for this group. The nonprofit, based in New York, has made a significant impact in tackling this widespread challenge.

data.title: REGENESIS introduces Carbonite™ at SILMO Paris 2025 - carbon-capturing eyewear material made from waste; 2 years R&D.
data.description: In a groundbreaking development, a carbon-capturing eyewear material has been introduced to the market by Regenesis in Paris on September 25, 2025. This material is considered practically unbreakable, offering both high performance and style in frame design. The innovative product is the result of two years of dedicated research, development, and testing. By repurposing waste materials, Regenesis has successfully created a sustainable option for eyewear that captures carbon.

data.title: IAB lowers 2025 outlook by 1.6% due to economic concerns. Social, retail media, CTV to see double-digit growth.
data.description: In New York on September 25, 2025, the latest IAB's 2025 Outlook Study September Update indicated a 1.6 percentage point reduction in the economic outlook. Advertisers are adjusting their strategies amidst this shift in the economy. This study provides insights into the current trends, opportunities, and tactics in ad spend.

data.title: GDIT awarded $1.5B contract to strengthen US Strategic Command with digital engineering and cyber capabilities.
data.description: General Dynamics Information Technology (GDIT), a unit of General Dynamics, based in Falls Church, Virginia, will utilize digital engineering, artificial intelligence (AI), and cyber technologies to strengthen strategic deterrence, specifically focusing on vital nuclear command and control systems. This initiative is set to commence on September 25, 2025.

data.title: Praxis Solutions acquires WEALTHAWK, an AI lead generation platform for advisors, expanding its services.
data.description: In September 25, 2025, in Newport Beach, California, Praxis Solutions revealed their latest expansion through the acquisition of WEALTHAWK, an AI technology platform. This platform is known for pinpointing "money-in-motion" occurrences, recognizing clients during crucial times when they require financial assistance. This acquisition marks a significant step for Praxis Solutions, showcasing their commitment to leveraging innovative technologies to enhance their services.

data.title: US wealth gap is a chasm: Top 1% own $52T, bottom 50% own $4T. Rents rising faster than incomes, hitting renters hard.
data.description: The wealth gap in the US is vast, with the wealthiest 1 percent of households holding $52 trillion in net worth, while the bottom 50 percent only have $4 trillion combined. This means the richest slice of society has thirteen times more wealth than half the country combined. Income inequality is illustrated through rising rents, which increased by 5.8% last year while renter incomes only grew by 5.3%. Over the past two decades, rents have surged by 26.7% (inflation-adjusted), while renter incomes have only gone up by 7.7%. This disparity benefits asset owners who profit from rent payments, leaving many renter households - around 12.1 million - spending over half of their income on rent. The situation highlights the stark economic divide in the country.
Goldman's Waldron: US fiscal picture doesn't appear to be sustainable for the long term.

data.title: Suffolk & School District in Lee County finish Riverdale High School expansion; on time & on budget benefitting 2,000 students.
data.description: Suffolk, a leading construction company in the US, has marked the completion of the Riverdale High School expansion in partnership with the School District of Lee County. The project, aimed at enhancing the learning environment, accommodates over 2,000 students. The renovation was executed efficiently within the scheduled timeline and budget. The successful completion highlights Suffolk's expertise in delivering innovative construction projects. The collaboration between Suffolk and the school district showcased meticulous planning and coordination due to the project's execution on a busy campus.

data.title: CleanSpark obtains $100 million credit line from Two Prime, doubling total borrowing capacity to $400 million for expansion.
data.description: CleanSpark has recently received a significant financial boost with the unveiling of a cutting-edge facility worth $100 million through a partnership with Two Prime. This development has substantially increased CleanSpark's overall borrowing capacity to a noteworthy $400 million. The primary focus of this financial injection is to propel the expansion of data centers and hashrate, a move that is pivotal for the company's growth and development in the sector.

Typhoon Ragasa has now weakened. As cities are restoring from the aftermath, videos of people taking shelters in Shenzhen has been trending on social media. Shenzhen provided 865 shelters before the typhoon’s landing, in order to protect workers from construction sites.

data.title: NSI International launches YumYum! Real Baking Oven for kids to bake cakes, cookies, and blondies safely.
data.description: Introducing a new way for little bakers to unleash their creativity! NSI International Inc. has launched the YumYum! Real Baking Oven in New York on September 25, 2025. This innovative kid-friendly oven allows children to safely bake a variety of treats, including cakes, cookies, and blondies. Get ready for big fun with this exciting product that combines entertainment with education.

data.title: Jetvia's new Elite Jet Card offers transparent terms, no hidden costs, guaranteed availability, and hourly rates starting from $5,714.
data.description: In El Paso, Texas, Jetvia has introduced the Elite Jet Card, a straightforward private jet membership program with transparent pricing and no undisclosed fees. The membership offers competitive hourly rates starting from $5,714.
ITALY’S ECONOMY MINISTER GIORGETTI SAYS THE DIGITAL EURO WILL TAKE TWO YEARS TO ROLL OUT, DURING WHICH CRYPTOCURRENCIES MAY SEE CHAOS, AND THE EUROPEAN UNION RISKS DELAYS.

data.title: Cloudflare introducing NET Dollar stablecoin, backed by USD, for AI-driven internet finance.
data.description: Cloudflare, a major player in the internet industry, will be launching its own stablecoin known as the NET Dollar. This stablecoin will be backed by the U.S. dollar and is intended to facilitate AI agent finance. This move signifies Cloudflare's entry into the world of digital currency with a focus on providing stable financial support for AI ventures.

data.title: New AI bots will trade your crypto on Solana, BNB Chain, and Base, offering 24/7 autonomous trading. Aim is to simplify and gamify algorithmic strategies using AI.
data.description: AIQuant is offering autonomous trading services around the clock across various blockchains. The company aims to streamline and make algorithmic strategies more engaging through the use of AI technology.
